rewritten_requirements: The system shall facilitate trading of goods between buyers and sellers.
The system shall provide payment options that allow buyers to manage risk.
The system shall have a user-friendly interface.
The system shall enable buyers to inspect products with sellers present for customer satisfaction.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The website can be used to sell or trade goods with someone who needs them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: I would like to put forward a website that can be used to sell or trade the goods with someone who needs them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Buyers can opt for payment options to control risk.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The buyer can opt for the payment options with which they control the risk.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The website has a user-friendly layout.
Buyers can inspect products in front of sellers to ensure customer satisfaction.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The buyer gets to inspect the product in front of the seller which ensures customer satisfaction
